'''zhanasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadmender|roadmender]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadmender|roadmender]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhanasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhænæsæth|zhænæsæth]] || [[word:zhænæsæj|zhænæsæj]] || [[word:zhænæsæsh|zhænæsæsh]] || [[word:zhænæsæ|zhænæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhananasath|zhananasath]] || [[word:zhananasaj|zhananasaj]] || [[word:zhananasash|zhananasash]] || [[word:zhananasa|zhananasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhanasath|zhanasath]] || [[word:zhanasaj|zhanasaj]] || [[word:zhanasash|zhanasash]] || [[word:zhanasa|zhanasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhanafsath|zhanafsath]] || [[word:zhanafsaj|zhanafsaj]] || [[word:zhanafsash|zhanafsash]] || [[word:zhanafsaf|zhanafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhanasatha|zhanasatha]] || [[word:zhanasaja|zhanasaja]] || [[word:zhanasasha|zhanasasha]] || [[word:zhanasaka|zhanasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhanasath|zhanasath]] || [[word:zhanasaj|zhanasaj]] || [[word:zhanasash|zhanasash]] || [[word:zhanasa|zhanasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhanasathal|zhanasathal]] || [[word:zhanasajal|zhanasajal]] || [[word:zhanasashal|zhanasashal]] || [[word:zhanasakal|zhanasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhanasathatha|zhanasathatha]] || [[word:zhanasajaja|zhanasajaja]] || [[word:zhanasashasha|zhanasashasha]] || [[word:zhanasaka|zhanasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhanasathan|zhanasathan]] || [[word:zhanasajan|zhanasajan]] || [[word:zhanasashan|zhanasashan]] || [[word:zhanasakan|zhanasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhanasathaoro|zhanasathaoro]] || [[word:zhanasajaoro|zhanasajaoro]] || [[word:zhanasashaoro|zhanasashaoro]] || [[word:zhanasakaoro|zhanasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
